title: athyrium sarasinorum
intro: Athyrium sarasinorum, also known as Sarasin's Lady Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family, Athyriaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema. The herbal preparations of Athyrium sarasinorum typically involve decoctions or infusions of the plant's leaves or roots, which are used to treat various ailments.
